exclusion_criteria.criterion: Speech-to-text (ASR) papers where the output is not generative audio.
Papers where the output is a video.
Papers whose output is non-generative (e.g., classification rather than generation).
Other non-research-paper publication forms that are not full research papers.
Supplemental materials not included in the main body of the paper (the review did not extend into external supplementary files).

required.criterion: Full research paper (long-form publication) in the generative audio domain.
The paper is about generative audio models (the primary focus is a generative audio model).
The paper either (i) introduces a generative audio model/application, or (ii) analyzes/discusses generative audio models (e.g., ethics/implications).
Evidence sources considered for analysis include the main text and appendices included in the paper.

summary_topics.description: The Ethical Implications of Generative Audio Models: A
